column1: The new BMW voice assistant is incredibly responsive and helpful!
The new BMW voice assistant is incredibly unresponsive and is not helpful!
The new BMW voice assistant is incredibly unresponsive but helpful!
The new BMW voice assistant is incredibly unresponsive!
I love how quickly it changes the cabin temperature when I ask.
The navigation system completely misunderstood my destination.
Brilliant integration with Spotify, very seamless experience.
Terrible experience, the assistant keeps freezing when I ask for directions.
The voice recognition is okay, but it struggles to understand my accent.
It takes way too long to connect to my phone and read my messages.
Very intuitive menu system, I didn't even need to look at the screen.
It keeps interrupting me before I finish speaking my command.
Honestly, the best in-car assistant I have ever used.
Sometimes it answers perfectly, other times it just ignores me completely.
Great at finding charging stations nearby!
